test.template:
Build and test the project:
!`cmake -B build -DBUILD_TESTS=ON 2>/dev/null && cmake --build build 2>/dev/null || echo 'Build failed'`
!`ctest --test-dir build --output-on-failure 2>/dev/null || echo 'No tests found'`

Fix any build errors and test failures.

build.template:
Build the project:
!`cmake -B build 2>/dev/null && cmake --build build --config Release 2>/dev/null || echo 'Build failed'`

Fix any build errors.

review.template:
Review the current C++ code for:
- Modern C++17 patterns
- Memory management (smart pointers, RAII)
- Performance (copy elision, move semantics)
- JUCE framework best practices
- Cross-platform compatibility
- Audio/MIDI correctness

Suggest specific improvements.
